abort.single_instance_allowed: Default Config Manager is already installed.

error.default_config_enabled: default_config is enabled in configuration.yaml. Unable to manage integrations.
error.advanced_warning: Advanced mode allows disabling default_config integrations. Use with caution.

data_description.mode_dropdown: Error: Default Config Manager is missing from config file. Please add 'default_config_manager:' to configuration.yaml then restart. [More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

Error: Standard Default Config is enabled. Change 'default_config:' to 'default_config_manager:' in configuration.yaml then restart. [More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

Error: Both 'default_config:' and 'default_config_manager:' are enabled. Remove 'default_config:' from configuration.yaml then restart. [More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).
Default Config Manager is managing default integrations. Use Advanced Mode for full control. [More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

disclaimer.title: Advanced Mode Warning
disclaimer.description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** Advanced mode allows you to disable core components. Do your research as misconfiguration can break core functionality and affect integrations.

Please confirm if you want to proceed.

data.acknowledge: I understand the risks, enable Advanced Mode.

revert_basic.title: Revert to Managed Mode
revert_basic.description:
You are switching back to Basic Mode. Any disabled integrations will now be re-enabled.

Click Submit to confirm or X to cancel.

error.must_acknowledge: You must check the box to confirm you understand the risks before saving.

missing_yaml.title: Missing Configuration
missing_yaml.description:
No Default Config is enabled.

To enable Default Config Manager, add 'default_config_manager:' to configuration.yaml then restart Home Assistant. This is required for factory startup behaviour

[More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

standard_only.title: Incorrect Configuration
standard_only.description:
Standard Default Config is enabled.

To enable Default Config Manager, change 'default_config:' to 'default_config_manager:' in your configuration.yaml then restart Home Assistant. This is required for factory startup behaviour

[More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

both_enabled.title: Incorrect Configuration
both_enabled.description:
Both Standard and Managed Default Configs are enabled.

Please remove the standard 'default_config:' from your configuration.yaml then restart Home Assistant.

[More information](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).

restart_required.title: Restart Required
restart_required.description: Changes to enabled integrations have been detected. Restart is required for changes to take effect.

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to restart to apply changes?
